features.name: robot_left_of_target_center
features.source:
def f1(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    target_cx = target_x + target_width / 2.0
    target_cy = target_y + target_height / 2.0
    return robot_x < target_cx

features.name: manhattan_distance_to_target_very_close
features.source:
def f5(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    target_cx = target_x + target_width / 2.0
    target_cy = target_y + target_height / 2.0
    dist = abs(robot_x - target_cx) + abs(robot_y - target_cy)
    return dist < 0.25

features.name: euclidean_distance_to_target_very_close
features.source:
def f9(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    target_cx = target_x + target_width / 2.0
    target_cy = target_y + target_height / 2.0
    dist = ((robot_x - target_cx)**2 + (robot_y - target_cy)**2)**0.5
    return dist < 0.25

features.name: robot_inside_target_region
features.source:
def f13(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    return (robot_x >= target_x) and (robot_x <= target_x + target_width) and (robot_y >= target_y) and (robot_y <= target_y + target_height)

features.name: robot_next_step_inside_target_region
features.source:
def f14(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    next_x = robot_x + dx
    next_y = robot_y + dy
    return (next_x >= target_x) and (next_x <= target_x + target_width) and (next_y >= target_y) and (next_y <= target_y + target_height)

features.name: robot_moving_toward_target_center
features.source:
def f15(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    target_cx = target_x + target_width / 2.0
    target_cy = target_y + target_height / 2.0
    to_target_x = target_cx - robot_x
    to_target_y = target_cy - robot_y
    dot = dx * to_target_x + dy * to_target_y
    return dot > 0

features.name: robot_moving_away_from_target_center
features.source:
def f16(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_y = s[1]
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    target_x = s[9]
    target_y = s[10]
    target_width = s[17]
    target_height = s[18]
    target_cx = target_x + target_width / 2.0
    target_cy = target_y + target_height / 2.0
    to_target_x = target_cx - robot_x
    to_target_y = target_cy - robot_y
    dot = dx * to_target_x + dy * to_target_y
    return dot < 0

features.name: robot_y_aligned_with_passage0_gap
features.source:
def f17(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_y = s[20]
    obstacle0_height = s[28]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    obstacle1_height = s[38]
    gap_lower = obstacle0_y + obstacle0_height + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = obstacle1_y + obstacle1_height - robot_base_radius
    return (robot_y >= gap_lower) and (robot_y <= gap_upper)

features.name: robot_next_y_aligned_with_passage0_gap
features.source:
def f18(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    dy = a[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_y = s[20]
    obstacle0_height = s[28]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    obstacle1_height = s[38]
    gap_lower = obstacle0_y + obstacle0_height + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = obstacle1_y + obstacle1_height - robot_base_radius
    next_y = robot_y + dy
    return (next_y >= gap_lower) and (next_y <= gap_upper)

features.name: robot_left_of_passage0_wall
features.source:
def f19(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_x = s[19]
    return robot_x + robot_base_radius < obstacle0_x

    return (robot_x >= wall_left) and (robot_x < wall_right)

features.source:
def f32(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_x = s[19]
    obstacle0_width = s[27]
    wall_left = obstacle0_x
    wall_right = obstacle0_x + obstacle0_width + robot_base_radius
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    return (robot_x >= wall_left) and (robot_x < wall_right) and (abs(dx) > abs(dy))

features.name: robot_y_aligned_with_passage0_gap_and_horizontal_action
features.source:
def f33(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_y = s[20]
    obstacle0_height = s[28]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    obstacle1_height = s[38]
    gap_lower = obstacle0_y + obstacle0_height + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = obstacle1_y + obstacle1_height - robot_base_radius
    dx = a[0]
    dy = a[1]
    return (robot_y >= gap_lower) and (robot_y <= gap_upper) and (abs(dx) > abs(dy))

features.name: robot_next_x_collides_with_passage0_wall
features.source:
def f34(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    dx = a[0]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_x = s[19]
    obstacle0_width = s[27]
    wall_left = obstacle0_x
    wall_right = obstacle0_x + obstacle0_width
    next_left = robot_x + dx - robot_base_radius
    next_right = robot_x + dx + robot_base_radius
    return (next_right > wall_left) and (next_left < wall_right)

features.name: robot_moving_toward_passage0_gap_center
features.source:
def f39(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    dy = a[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_y = s[20]
    obstacle0_height = s[28]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    obstacle1_height = s[38]
    gap_lower = obstacle0_y + obstacle0_height + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = obstacle1_y + obstacle1_height - robot_base_radius
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    to_gap = gap_center - robot_y
    return (abs(to_gap) > 0.01) and (dy * to_gap > 0)

features.name: robot_moving_away_from_passage0_gap_center

def f40(s, a):

    obstacle1_height = s[38]
    gap_lower = obstacle0_y + obstacle0_height + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = obstacle1_y + obstacle1_height - robot_base_radius
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    to_gap = gap_center - robot_y
    return (abs(to_gap) > 0.01) and (dy * to_gap < 0)

def f41(s, a):

features.name: robot_y_far_from_passage0_gap_center

def f42(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]

    obstacle1_y = s[30]

    gap_upper = obstacle1_y + obstacle1_height - robot_base_radius
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    return abs(robot_y - gap_center) > 0.2

def f52(s, a):
    robot_x = s[0]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_x = s[19]
    obstacle0_width = s[27]
    wall_right = obstacle0_x + obstacle0_width
    dx = a[0]
    return (robot_x - robot_base_radius > wall_right) and (dx > 0)

features.name: robot_left_of_target_and_dx_positive

robot_above_target_and_dy_negative
robot_moving_toward_passage0_gap_and_not_colliding
features.source:
def f60(s, a):
    robot_y = s[1]
    dy = a[1]
    robot_base_radius = s[3]
    obstacle0_y = s[20]
    obstacle0_height = s[28]
    obstacle1_y = s[30]
    obstacle1_height = s[38]
    gap_lower = obstacle0_y + obstacle0_height + robot_base_radius
    gap_upper = obstacle1_y + obstacle1_height - robot_base_radius
    gap_center = (gap_lower + gap_upper) / 2.0
    to_gap = gap_center - robot_y
    robot_x = s[0]
    dx = a[0]
    obstacle0_x = s[19]
    obstacle0_width = s[27]
    wall_left = obstacle0_x
    wall_right = obstacle0_x + obstacle0_width
    next_left = robot_x + dx - robot_base_radius
    next_right = robot_x + dx + robot_base_radius
    collides = (next_right > wall_left) and (next_left < wall_right)
    return (abs(to_gap) > 0.01) and (dy * to_gap > 0) and (not collides)
